creator: vsotov@tatin.com
text:
Russian version of FreeBSD copyright (http://www.freebsd.org/ru/copyright/freebsd-license.html) contains wrong translation of word SOFTWARE. It translated as 채챦챘천챠책챤척찼찾챕챰, but more correct should be 챨챵챦챌챵찼챠챠챤챦책 챦창책처챨책첸책챤챕책.

How-To-Repeat: Go to http://www.freebsd.org/ru/copyright/freebsd-license.html
